sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BEATRIX de Coligny ([1194/95 or soon after]-[1240/Jan 1242]).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BEATRIX de Coligny, daughter of HUGUES Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf & his wife Beatrix d'Albon Dauphine de Viennois, Ctss d'Albon ([1194/95 or soon after]-[1240/Jan 1242]).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice De Coligny於1200年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾時，她的父親Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf40歲，母親Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois38歲。她和Albert de la Tour du Pin III至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1241年在她的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice De Coligny于1200年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾时，她的父亲Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf40岁，母亲Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois38岁。她和Albert de la Tour du Pin III至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1241年在她的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice De Coligny was born in 1200, in Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf, was 40 and her mother, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, was 38. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Albert de la Tour du Pin III. She died in 1241, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice De Coligny est née en 1200, à Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Albert de la Tour du Pin III. Elle est décédée en 1241, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice De Coligny 1200 in Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf 40 und ihre Mutter Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois 38. Sie hatte mit Albert de la Tour du Pin III mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1241 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice De Coligny è nata il nel 1200 nel Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Albert de la Tour du Pin III. Morì nel 1241, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice De Colignyが1200年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアで生まれた時，父Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neufは40歳，母Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennoisは38歳であった。彼女はAlbert de la Tour du Pin IIIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1241年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice De Coligny(이)가 1200년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Albert de la Tour du Pin III(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice De Coligny nasceu em 1200, em Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Albert de la Tour du Pin III. Ela faleceu em 1241, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice De Coligny родилась в 1200 г. в местности исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Albert de la Tour du Pin III. Она умерла в 1241 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice De Coligny nació en 1200, en Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Coligny - Seigneur de Coligny-le-Neuf, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Albert de la Tour du Pin III. Murió en 1241, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
